content.en:
"What is this?"

Ye Tian suddenly sensed a terrifying force, turned into a hand and grabbed his heart, directly crushing his heart.

And if the heart is crushed, it will naturally not die for the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

But then, a hand reached inside his body, shattering parts of his body.

Moment of truth.

Ye Tian urged the supreme divine power of reincarnation, the spear of the ruin, and stabbed fiercely into the unknown.

Burst!

As if something had been pierced, the unknown being retreated, but soon attacked again.

It wasn't until Ye Tian withdrew from this area that it was safe.

"What was that?"

Ye Tian didn't see the other party at all, and he didn't even sense the existence of the other party when he copied his talent.

It can make the copy talent unable to sense the other party, proving that the other party has no talent, may not be a normal life form, and the power is weird, and when it is not attacked, it cannot sense the existence of the other party at all.

This is the first time he has encountered this strange existence.

And the opponent's attack is very powerful, he can't resist it, he can only watch as this replica body is pinched and exploded everywhere, but once the opponent is stabbed, he should also be injured.

After all, after he cast the Spear of the Ruin, his combat power was enough to rival the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened six times!

......

Another place in the ruins of reincarnation.

One of Bloodhowl's slaves walked into an area and suddenly screamed in pain.

Immediately after, under the gaze of the Blood Howl and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlord Slaves, it was pinched and exploded, turning into countless blood mist, and then dissipated and died.

"This ......"

The slaves panicked.

They didn't see the enemy at all, they didn't see any danger, and this slave of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord was pinched up, and he didn't even have a chance to escape.

"Lord Blood Howl, isn't this a squeeze of heaven and earth?" a red skull giant asked in fear.

"No!" Blood howled, "This is the attack of the spirit of reincarnation!"

"The spirit of reincarnation?"

These slaves don't know.

Blood Howl continued: "The spirit of reincarnation cannot be seen or touched, and its attack power is very terrifying, even I can't fight against the spirit of reincarnation, and I must withdraw from the realm of the spirit of reincarnation to avoid being killed." Rest assured, the spirit of reincarnation is rare and not easy to encounter. "

However, these words naturally fooled these slaves.

The spirit of reincarnation is not very rare, but it is very easy to encounter, otherwise, he would not have found a dozen or so slaves at the level of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

What he fears most is also the spirit of reincarnation, which is much more dangerous than the squeezing of heaven and earth.

He can survive when he encounters the squeeze of heaven and earth, but when he encounters the spirit of reincarnation, he may not be able to survive.

If the slave died, he would definitely leave the ruins of reincarnation.

However, he would not say such a thing to these slaves.

When he came in this time, he didn't expect these slaves to survive.

Not only on the side of Blood Howl, but also on the side of other members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, such as Swallow Xi, they also encountered a lot of dangerous situations, and many slaves died one after another.

However, those members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan were naturally unwilling to give up, and their goal was to find treasure resources that could help them break through.

......

Ye Tian's strength is strong, but he doesn't have slaves after all, everything has to be explored by himself, and he also wants to go deep into the ruins of reincarnation, so the number of dangers he encounters will naturally be more.

However, the treasure resources he found were also more.

Moreover, after he was injured, he didn't heal his injuries, and if he died, he would naturally directly copy a copy of Aochen's body.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered the spirit of reincarnation again, so he did not escape, mainly because the body of this Ao Chen copy was seriously injured, so he died at the hands of the spirit of reincarnation.

In the years that followed, he continued to search for resources in the ruins of reincarnation.

"This is the !! of reincarnation"

Ye Tian saw a special piece of metal that exuded strong energy fluctuations, and his heart was extremely excited.

Reincarnation Xuanjin is a very important resource in the dark domain of reincarnation, and it is also a material for refining the treasure of reincarnation.

It can be said that the effect of reincarnation Xuanjin and immortal blood gold is the same.

It's just that the immortal blood gold is made from the bones of the origin ancestor, and the reincarnation Xuanjin is a naturally conceived resource, and it is only available in the reincarnation dark domain.

If you find enough reincarnation gold, you can also create a reincarnation treasure.

In the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, the Reincarnation Arcana is not as rare as the Land of Eternity, but if there are no members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan who have awakened seven times, don't want to get a Reincarnation Arcana.

He is also ready to stay in the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan for a long time, constantly transporting resources from the Reincarnation Dark Domain to the true body of the land on the other side of eternity, if the copy body here has a reincarnation treasure, it can also greatly improve his strength!

Immediately.

Ye Tian put away this piece of reincarnation gold.

Next, he continued to look for reincarnation Xuanjin here, and there are indeed a lot of reincarnation Xuanjin here, but because this place is very close to the core area of reincarnation ruins, there are many dangers.

There are many spirits like heaven and earth squeezing and reincarnation, so Ye Tian is not afraid of sacrificing his body, so he dares to look for reincarnation Xuanjin here.

If it were to swallow Xi and howl them with blood, there would not be enough more than a dozen slaves!

If they dare to come here, they will definitely have to flee quickly.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had already found enough reincarnation gold materials to refine a reincarnation treasure.

But.

He still hasn't left, and he's still searching.

He would have too many weapons like the Reincarnation Arcana, and if he could refine two, it would naturally be even better!

But.

The reincarnation gold here is not endless, and after looking for a period of time, he still hasn't gathered the amount of reincarnation gold that he has refined the second handful, so he has to continue to go deeper and look for other resources.

And soon, he made a new discovery and discovered another resource.

It is a flowing water with a certain attack ability, purple all over, and contains powerful energy.

After Ye Tian grabbed this water, he identified it, and probably recognized what this resource was.

"Reincarnation flow marrow!"

This is a very rare and precious resource, he has seen this kind of resource when he bought it before, and it is almost sold in milliliters.

One milliliter of reincarnation is worth 10,000 reincarnation coins.

At the beginning, he only earned tens of millions of reincarnation coins by relying on the competition, and there were at least thousands of milliliters of reincarnation pith here in front of him, that is, tens of millions of reincarnation coins, which was even more than what he earned in the last competition!
